title: Smoky Ethiopian Collard Stew
description: A hearty and aromatic pescatarian-friendly stew featuring collard greens, smoked paprika, and poached fish, perfect for a date-night dinner. This Ethiopian-inspired dish is sure to impress with its rich and smoky flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add smoked paprika, berbere spice, and chopped collard greens, cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, poach fish fillets in a separate pot of simmering water until cooked through.
Add poached fish to the stew and stir in lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
